_readme: AUTHORED monthly analyst notes, keyed by composite_history end-of-month date (YYYY-MM-DD). This file is NOT generated by export_dashboard_data.py — edit it by hand each month to add interpretation the data alone can't express. The dashboard shows the note for the latest data month and hides the slot if no note exists.

2026-04-30.analyst_note: Neutral, but with an unusual signature. The drag is above-target, re-accelerating inflation — not credit or growth stress — while growth and credit remain supportive. That makes today closer to 2021-style overheating risk than to the credit-led deterioration that normally precedes a downgrade. The actionable watch items are core PCE momentum and the financial-stress flag; a downgrade to Slowdown would most likely come through those, not through the labor market.
2026-04-30.author: MRS desk
